creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ohauer
Date: Thu Nov  7 05:58:42 2013
New Revision: 333064
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333064

Log:
  - Fix user users-groups script ('-e')
  
  PR:		ports/183628
  Submitted by:	ohauer
  Approved by:	portmgr (bapt via PM)

Modified:
  head/Mk/bsd.port.mk

Modified: head/Mk/bsd.port.mk
==============================================================================
--- head/Mk/bsd.port.mk	Thu Nov  7 05:37:32 2013	(r333063)
+++ head/Mk/bsd.port.mk	Thu Nov  7 05:58:42 2013	(r333064)
@@ -4261,7 +4261,7 @@ create-users-groups:
 								echo \"Adding user '$${_login}' to group '${_group}'.\"; \
 								${PW} groupmod ${_group} -m $${_login}; fi" >> ${TMPPLIST}; \
 					else \
-							${ECHO_CMD} "if ! ${PW} groupshow ${_group} | ${GREP} -qw $${_login}; then \n \
+							${ECHO_CMD} -e "if ! ${PW} groupshow ${_group} | ${GREP} -qw $${_login}; then \n \
 								echo \"Adding user '$${_login}' to group '${_group}'.\" \n \
 								${PW} groupmod ${_group} -m $${_login} \nfi" >> ${_UG_OUTPUT}; \
 					fi ; \
